author: taulepton_
content: I think we would also need this for optional proofs if we want to provide a node the ability to securely sync without an EL (and without downloading paylaods and proofs for the fill finalized prefix up to checkpoint).

author: taulepton_
content: I'm in support of this effort, but would encourage us to land a solution that is compatible with future execution-proof efforts (both optional and mandatory). I don't think execution proofs change the shape of the solution, but in any case, I think it should be reviewed from the perspective of the execution proof domain.

author: nero_eth
content:
I see!
Yeah we should then push even harder to get it in.

author: nero_eth
content: It might be too late for glamsterdam, but I'd say we propose it for hegota? <@755590043632140352>

author: nero_eth
content: Independent from g* vs h*? Don't you think it's the right thing to do or just opposed to championing it?

author: potuz
content: I think it is the right thing to do

author: potuz
content: I wouldn't have proposed it otherwise

author: nero_eth
content: Opinions can change, e.g. saying we shouldn't shot for short term improvements when the longterm goal is to get to unified clients.

author: nero_eth
content: But good to know. I'm happy pushing for in hegota🤝🏻

author: potuz
content: The long term goal of Ethereum is not agreed ever. I don't like to make assumptions on the long term goal of Ethereum specially on topics that are very much controversial
